title: 《不割席》再係imdb被造謠抹黑，再求大家幫手

replies.msg:
Imdb係最多人睇既電影網站之一。藍絲係imdb造謠抹黑《不割席》, 係連登手足要求下, imdb曾刪除所有撐共撐警items. 但而家, 果d撐共撐警items又全部再出現.

點解會咁? 因為而家正值奧斯卡拉票時期, 所以藍絲三毛一定全力造謠抹黑《不割席》. 試想想, 奧斯卡有大量評審員, 好多對紀錄短片唔多熟. 如果佢地睇左imdb造謠抹黑, 好可能唔會投票俾《不割席》, 到時藍絲就計畫通.

係奧斯卡投票完結前 (美國時間4月20日完結), 藍屍三毛一定死唔斷氣, 所以最近會不時再請求大家幫手, 唔好意思.

請求手足幫手，加入imdb做會員，要求imdb刪除以下兩個頁面中既撐共撐警items. 小弟會係下面列出那些items俾大家做野.
(唔好要求改文。集體要求刪文，成功率更大)

多謝大家

https://www.imdb.com/title/tt11512676/trivia?ref_=tt_trv_trv

- During the protest at Amoy Garden in September; at 07:12, the crowd can be heard chanting "add oil police". This is left out, despite being clearly audible.

- At 12:15 one of the protester claimed 'after 20 years of Chinese rule, there is no democracy'. During the entire 150 years of British rule, Hong Kong has never had a democracy and it's 'governor' was hand picked by the British government without an election. Not mentioned by democracy supporters was during the 2014-15 Hong Kong electoral reform, the pan-democracy camp voted against universal suffrage.

- The documentary concludes with a mention about the national security law when it fails to mention that other countries has it as well.

- At 14:35, when one of the protester show the filmmaker a clip of a police officer shooting a protester in the chest in Tsuen Wan, not mentioned anywhere in the documentary was that the protester was shot in self defense when he tried to attack the officer with his stick.

https://www.imdb.com/title/tt11512676/goofs?ref_=tttrv_sa_1

At the start, the captions reads 'the Hong Kong Legislative Council would not be given oversight into the extradition process' when in fact, the Judiciary of Hong Kong has 100% ability to veto.

手機版既話，去呢頁。
https://m.imdb.com/title/tt11512676/?ref_=ttgf_gf_tt

再去底部edit page，再入去相關選項, 要求刪文.
咩嚟？
多謝手足

quote.msg: 多謝手足

replies.msg: 多謝開po
推

quote.msg: 咩嚟？

replies.msg:
除香港外，內地自由繼續受限，昨日傳出有內地官員表示，因反送中紀錄片《不割席》（Do Not Spilt）入圍下月舉行的奧斯卡頒獎禮的最佳紀錄短片，加上被指辱華的女導演趙婷亦因執導《浪跡天地》（Nomadland）而入圍最佳導演，為避免尷尬及政治正確，故中宣部要求官媒報道奧斯卡要盡量低調，只能報道不敏感的內容，而中央電視台更擬取消直播今屆頒獎禮，但美國紀錄片製作公司「Field of Vision」早於今年初已將《不割席》放上YouTube頻道讓世界各地觀眾觀賞。

https://hk.appledaily.com/entertainment/20210317/VODF2Q2LI5CKXMCNRTEWZFI2RY/

quote.msg: 搵唔到點report or del trivia

replies.msg:
香蕉紳士:

連登仔個個all talk no action
我打返電腦版點edit，手機版靠其他人補充

1. 登入咗之後碌到最底，㩒「Edit page」


2. 喺想編緝嘅位揀「Correct / Delete」，然後碌到最底㩒「Continue」



3. 喺「Action」度，喺想刪除嘅位揀「Delete」，再揀「check these updates」


4. 寫低原因，再揀「re-check these updates」
我唔熟IMDB，所以求其打咗的原因就算


5. 㩒「submit these updates」


6. 搞掂！


希望大家都可以幫手，唔好覺得其他人見到post都會做，自己做free rider就得
tragedy of the commons就係咁樣嚟
